title: Visiting Eva themed places in Japan
display_title: Visiting Eva themed places in Japan
wikitext:
[]: Visiting Eva themed places in Japan             Quote Post by Silentgold » Sun Nov 18, 2012 2:05 pm Hello guys. I am going on a trip Japan to satisfy my hunger for all things anime. Being a huge Eva fan, I researched places to specifically satisfy my hunger or all things Eva. I found the Eva Tokyo 3 store and evangelion world... Any of you been there? Anything you can share with me? Thank you

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 18, 2012 2:18 pm Related threads http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12441/Fazmotrons-Japan-Eva-Trip/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/4828/Planning-a-trip-to-Japan/

[]:             Quote Post by Silentgold » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:40 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Related threads http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12441/Fazmotrons-Japan-Eva-Trip/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/4828/Planning-a-trip-to-Japan/

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Nov 19, 2012 11:45 am If you look at Fazmotron's report thread he did just that. I don't know how obvious or surreptitious he was about this though. There is a Hakone Instrumentality Map put out by the JNTO that has been translated into English that shows you where the corresponding locations in Hakone that appear in Rebuild. You can contact your local JNTO office and ask that they send you a map. I also requested a Cool Japan Hakone poster featuring Rei in addition to the map and they sent both. I don't think anyone on the forum has been to Hakone yet though, I would like to hear about it.
